relation_extraction_template: Create HAS_SUB_ITEM relations between hierarchy levels: (Col) -[HAS_SUB_ITEM]-> (Healthcare). Create HAS_VALUE relations from leaf entities to numeric columns: .
extraction_constraints: Detect hierarchy by sparse fill: empty cells in key columns inherit the parent value.
Top-level key '_col_0' defines the root entity (Col).
Second-level key '医疗卫生经常性开支 (当时价格)' defines child entities (Healthcare) linked to their parent via HAS_SUB_ITEM.
Leaf key '私人医疗卫生经常性开支相对本地生产总值的百分比' defines the most granular entity (Healthcare).
Numeric columns become HAS_VALUE relations from the leaf entity.
Remarks/notes columns become metadata properties (not separate entities).
Skip rows that are entirely empty or contain only section headers.
